nasb.text: “For behold, I am sending serpents against you, Adders, for which there is no charm, And they will bite you,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: For behold, I am sending among you serpents, adders that cannot be charmed, and they shall bite you,” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “看哪！我要打發毒蛇到你們中間， 是沒有法術能制伏的， 牠們必咬你們。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “看啊，我要派毒蛇去咬你们， 法术无法制服它们。” 这是耶和华说的。
